name: LT7381
description:
Driver for LT7381 mcu that drives among others the ER-TFT-MC070-4 display from buydisplay.com. The LT7381 is similar to the LT768x family that is a clone of the RA8876 (I think. Just mentioning because they might be compatible, no tested though). This lib is built to rely on esp-idf's esp_lcd and an example is given to use with LVGL.

https://www.buydisplay.com/low-cost-arduino-7-inch-touch-screen-800x480-i2c-lcd-tft-spi-display

https://www.levetop.cn/uploadfiles/2023/05/LT7381_BFDS_V11_ENG.pdf

Thanks to danmeuk for https://github.com/danmeuk/esp_lcd_ra8876
